pub ep_requested: String,
    pub fallback_used: bool,
    pub baseline_us: u64,

    pub inference_backend: HashMap<String, InferenceBackendInfo>,
    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = "Option::is_none")]
    pub inference_health: Option<InferenceHealthStatus>,
}
